basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER)
basic_details.short_information: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree or equivalent in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, Biomedical Sciences or related field with minimum two years research experience
qualification.details: Master's degree or equivalent in a relevant discipline, including Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, Biomedical Sciences, or another related field with a minimum of two years of research experience after Master's.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PGIMER Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PGIMER Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Master's degree or equivalent in a relevant discipline, including Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, Biomedical Sciences, or another related field with a minimum of two years of research experience after Master's.

PGIMER Senior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the PGIMER Senior Research Fellow position is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree or equivalent in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, Biomedical Sciences, or a related field, along with at least two years of research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Research Fellow position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000 per month, along with 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the PGIMER Senior Research Fellow job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Senior Research Fellow announced under this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application review, followed by shortlisting of eligible candidates, and finally an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is PGIMER located?
faq.answer: PGIMER is located in Chandigarh, with the pincode 160012.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Senior Research Fellow is on a contractual basis.
